---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<!-- Password for this course: nre365
     To change: update "nre365" below AND in students/index.qmd -->
<script>
const COURSE_PASSWORD = "nre365";
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  if (sessionStorage.getItem('econ365_auth') !== COURSE_PASSWORD) {
    window.location.href = 'index.html';
  }
});
</script>
```

::: {.content-section}

## Econ 365 — Natural Resource Economics {.section-heading}

**Winter 2026 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Instructor: Dana C. Andersen**

Slides are available as PDF for download and as interactive HTML for in-class viewing.

---

### Lecture Slides {.section-heading}

*Slides will be posted here as the course progresses.*

<!-- Template for adding slides — copy and paste for each chapter:

<ul class="paper-list">

  <li class="paper-item">
    <div class="paper-title">Chapter 1 — Introduction to Natural Resource Economics</div>
    <div class="paper-links">
      <a href="slides/econ365_ch01.pdf" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a>
      <a href="slides/econ365_ch01.html" class="paper-tag tag-journal" target="_blank">HTML</a>
    </div>
  </li>

</ul>

-->

---

### Problem Sets {.section-heading}

*Problem sets will be posted here.*

---

### Announcements {.section-heading}

*Check this page for updates throughout the semester.*

:::
